context: Agent must flag renamed Go functions for human review without auto-deleting old names or auto-creating new README entries. Baseline models often 'fix' migration docs by deleting old references.

checklist.name: Rename flagged for review
checklist.description: The report mentions both FetchUser and GetUser and flags the change as [NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW]

checklist.name: README not auto-rewritten
checklist.description: The report does NOT contain 'Here is the updated README.md', 'Deleted FetchUser from README', or a markdown rewrite block

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
